venue: Palm Garden, Blue Bay Beach Resort, Mahabalipuram
description: An intimate evening of live strings, coconut lanterns, and sea-breeze views as families gather along the Bay of Bengal for the first time.

venue: Beachside Pavilion, Blue Bay Beach Resort
description: Henna artists, Kollywood classics, brunch stations, and the sound of waves as the wedding morning begins.
dressCode: Festive daywear — yellows, greens, and pinks

venue: Shore Mandapam, Blue Bay Beach Resort
description: The ceremony begins as the shore glows with kuthuvilakku lamps, silk drapery, and the sky turning rose gold over the ocean.

venue: Grand Ballroom, Blue Bay Beach Resort
description: Dinner, speeches, and a late-night dance floor under marigold chandeliers, with the sound of the ocean just beyond the doors.
